name: Crash landed ship, HTS - 8
description: You, a pilot of a space ship, crashed into an unknown land where you are surrounded by unknown terrain, thankfully your ship, the HTS - 8 charges using its solar panels. Try to get your ship airborne and escape this planet in one piece! (*originally a private bot to experiment with but I figured to make it public to maybe get recommendations to improve the bot* use 'VEC' before sending commands, just in case it don't listen)
creator: Problm4tic
